top_claims.claim: Tel Aviv Stock Exchange is a regulated croupier on Israeli capital markets: fees on trading, listing, clearing, and data with minimal balance-sheet risk. FY2024 results show NIS 437.9 million revenue and NIS 101.4 million net profit; data distribution and connectivity grew strongly while trading and clearing commission
We expect **-12.94%** per year over 7 years at **~$145.3** on **$1.04/sh** starting owner cash.
*Primary risk: Multiple compression if 2024-level activity and data-fee growth normalize while the market retains a premium valuation on recent earnings momentum.
Geopolitical or macro shocks reduce local trading and listing activity.
